name: fixed_altitude_orbit_period_h
criterion: Expected about 10.6845 h for 500 x 36,000 km orbit

name: minimum_altitude_km
criterion: Should remain near the 500 km perigee altitude

name: maximum_altitude_km
criterion: Should remain near the 36,000 km apogee altitude with J2 tolerance

name: minimum_contact_elevation_rad
criterion: All contacts must be above configured minimum elevation

name: eclipse_samples
criterion: Eclipse count is scenario-dependent; value is recorded for evidence

name: eps_minimum_state_of_charge
criterion: Preliminary EPS reserve should stay at or above 20% SOC

name: eps_unserved_energy_j
criterion: No unserved load energy in the baseline run

name: eps_array_eol_power_w
criterion: Solar array EOL power should meet or exceed the 1.2 kW brief value

name: eps_peak_load_w
criterion: Peak modeled load should not exceed the 1.2 kW EOL power budget

name: eps_average_load_w
criterion: Average modeled load should stay below the 1.2 kW EOL power budget

name: thermal_component_limit_flag
criterion: No thermal component limit flags in the baseline run

name: adcs_final_angular_speed_deg_s
criterion: Detumble demonstration should end below 0.05 deg/s

name: adcs_wheel_saturated
criterion: Reaction wheel storage should not saturate in the baseline run

name: ttc_xband_min_margin_db
criterion: X-band link margin should exceed the 3 dB threshold

name: ttc_uhf_min_margin_db
criterion: UHF link margin should exceed the 3 dB threshold

name: ttc_xband_data_rate_bps
criterion: Earth downlink should meet at least 100 Mbps when available
